name: Diagnostics: Access Mode
title: Diagnostics: Access Mode
description: Parameter access functions can access the transmitted value as follows:
diagGetComplexParameter | diagGetComplexRespParameter | diagGetParameter | diagGetRespParameter | diagSetComplexParameter | diagSetParameter
tables: numerical: Access to the transmitted numerical value.
physical: Access to the value calculated from the transmitted numerical value (is also displayed symbolical as text).
coded: Immediate transformation into a numeric type (up to 32 bit), i.e. floating point values will also be provided in their internal description (bit form).
